ingredients.address: 2 Chome-19-18 Kamimeguro, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0051, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 11, Aqua and Akane cross this pedestrian bridge in Nakameguro during their strained outing, the ordinary urban backdrop contrasting with the tension building between them.

ingredients.address: Japan, 〒882-1414 Miyazaki, Nishiusuki District, Takachiho, Kawachi, 県道8−号線

ingredients.address: 6 Chome-4-26 Toyosu, Koto City, Tokyo 135-0061, Japan

ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 3, Aqua walks through the quiet greenery of Shin-Toyosu Forest while processing the pressures of the stage play production, the contrast of nature against the industrial waterfront underscoring his inner conflict.

ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 9, Aqua and Akane meet at Ebisu Station's west exit plaza, their awkward encounter in the busy commuter space reflecting the complicated feelings developing between them.

ingredients.address: 1 Chome-21-21 Takadanobaba, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 169-0075, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 5, this Takadanobaba area parking lot appears in the background during a scene involving Aqua and the stage play production team, used as a mundane urban meeting point.

ingredients.address: 2-chōme-2 Toyosu, Koto City, Tokyo 135-0061, Japan

ingredients.address: センタービル, 2 Chome-5-24 Harumi, Chuo City, Tokyo 104-0053, Japan

ingredients.address: 25 Meguro, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0063, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 13, the cherry-blossom-lined Meguro River promenade appears in a Tokyo scene framing the emotional resolution of the LovNow arc, the sakura imagery underscoring bittersweet feelings between Aqua and Akane.

ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 13, the LovNow cast lodges at Ryokan Shinsen in Takachiho, and the traditional inn's quiet rooms become the setting for private moments where Aqua's real feelings toward Akane begin to surface.

ingredients.name: Takachiho Shrine
ingredients.address: 1037 Mitai, Takachiho, Nishiusuki District, Miyazaki 882-1101, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 13, Takachiho Shrine is the central pilgrimage site the LovNow reality cast visits, its towering cryptomeria forest and night kagura performances creating one of the season's most visually striking and emotionally charged sequences.

ingredients.address: 1 Chome-10-1 Nagatachō, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 100-0014, Japan

ingredients.address: 667 Mitai, Takachiho, Nishiusuki District, Miyazaki 882-1101, Japan

ingredients.address: Kawachi, Takachiho, Nishiusuki District, Miyazaki 882-1414, Japan

ingredients.name: Kumanonarutaki Shrine
ingredients.address: 32-2 Kawachi, Takachiho, Nishiusuki District, Miyazaki 882-1414, Japan

ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 12, the LovNow production crew and cast land at Kumamoto Airport on their way to Takachiho, the arrival marking the beginning of the Miyazaki arc that will force Aqua to confront his feelings for Akane.

ingredients.address: Mitai, Takachiho, Nishiusuki District, Miyazaki 882-1101, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 13, the LovNow cast visits Onokoro Pond near Takachiho Shrine, the mythologically named sacred pool adding a layer of creation-myth resonance to the reality show's forced romantic scenarios.

ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 13, the LovNow cast visits Kunimigaoka Viewing Platform at dawn to watch the famous sea of clouds over the Takachiho valley, and the breathtaking natural spectacle becomes one of the season's most visually memorable moments.
